atomic_facts.fact: The text 'HARJINDER SIDHU' is displayed in the center of the screen.
Six different food dishes are arranged in a grid around the central text.
The top row features a stir-fry, roasted chicken, and naan bread.

spatial: The text 'HARJINDER SIDHU' is in the center of the frame. The stir-fried meat dish is to the top left of the text, and the roasted chicken is above the text.
